name: HWR_DI_CONNECTOR_DEF
description: This table stores the DI (Flow based) connector definition.

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for this table.

columns.Name: FILE_CONTENTS
columns.Comments: The contents of the OpenAPI(Swagger) file.

columns.Name: ICON_IMG
columns.Comments: The image file for the connector icon.

columns.Name: CONNECTOR_TYPE
columns.Comments: Record the type of the connector, communication, social reputation, wellness.

columns.Name: OVERALL_STATUS
columns.Comments: The indicator showing the current status of the overall definition.

columns.Name: PROCESS_STATUS
columns.Comments: The indicator showing the top-level steps where the guided process to resume from.

columns.Name: FROM_SEEDED
columns.Comments: Indicate if a connector is created from seeded open api or not.

columns.Name: SEEDED_CONNECTOR_TYPE
columns.Comments: The column stores the connector type if created from the seeded template.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
